name: obtrace-zero
description: Zero-touch auto-instrumentation operator for Kubernetes. Detects language, injects SDK or eBPF sidecar, sends OTLP to ingest-edge.

resources.description: Overview, install, quickstart, supported languages, strategies, CLI commands

conventions.sdk_philosophy: Language agents are single-file loaders with zero external dependencies. All policy logic lives server-side.
conventions.detection: Language detected from container image, command, args, labels. Override via obtrace.io/language label or CRD languageHints.
conventions.strategies: auto (default), sdk, ebpf, hybrid, disable. Auto picks SDK for interpreted, eBPF for compiled.
conventions.telemetry_format: OTLP JSON direct to ingest-edge. No intermediate collector.
conventions.injection_mechanisms: NODE_OPTIONS --require, PYTHONSTARTUP, JAVA_TOOL_OPTIONS -javaagent, DOTNET_STARTUP_HOOKS, PHP auto_prepend_file, RUBYOPT -r
